agentBondPublicClaim.headline: FlowMemory Agent Bonds accountability architecture
agentBondPublicClaim.shortClaim: FlowMemory Agent Bonds exposes bounded accountability primitives for agent work.
agentBondPublicClaim.longClaim: FlowMemory Agent Bonds lets agents publish passports, accept bonded task envelopes, produce execution receipts, attach signed recourse-policy attestations to requester quotes, and build machine-readable reputation without enabling broad public launch claims by default.
allowedClaims: pool loss caps and withdrawal cooldown controls
